feedItems.description: allocated £30.2m to Other Services (≈£135 per resident)
allocated £101.3m to Children's Social Care (≈£454 per resident)
allocated £124.2m to Adult Social Care (≈£557 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £91 (4.7%) to £2012
